path: Problem: Return a fallback value unless exactly one value exists across multiple optional input cells; flag an error when multiple inputs are present
Action: Use COUNTA to count nonblank candidates, CHOOSE to branch by count, CONCAT (or TEXTJOIN) to return the single candidate, and IFERROR to trap invalid branches
Observation: Counting nonblanks across the candidate range enables a 3-way decision: 0 candidates -> fallback, 1 candidate -> return it, 2+ candidates -> force an error/caution
